text.text: Jako ljubazni i profesionalni. Sve se lako moze dogovoriti

originalText.text: Jako ljubazni i profesionalni. Sve se lako moze dogovoriti

text.text:
My wife and I were both treated by this doctor. After the initial examination he asked us to do an orthopantomogram (panoramic X-ray) so he could understand the full situation and properly plan the treatment.
Despite the language barrier (our Montenegrin and English are not very strong), he patiently explained everything as many times as needed.

He was also very flexible with appointments and tried to adjust the schedule whenever possible. What impressed us most is that he was willing to work on teeth that other dentists had already considered hopeless. A professional, calm approach and a real feeling that you are in good hands.

ownerResponse.text: Thanks. You are also great patients.

text.text:
Saved me from the consequences of unsuccessful treatment!
A huge thank you to the doctors at Raznatovic Clinic! They professionally and quickly solved a problem caused in another dental clinic. I came to them with pain and inflammation under a bridge and left with immense relief. True experts in their field whom you can safely trust with your health. Highly recommended!

originalText.text:

text.text: Boris is an incredibly qualified specialist. I was very lucky to find him among a large number of clinics. I had a serious situation - a chewing tooth split in two. It seemed impossible to save the tooth. Boris, even without knowing how long I would stay in Montenegro, never tried to impose unnecessary services. The first thing he offered was to save the tooth, although the chance was small. He performed an operation to remove the chipped part, put a suture on the gum for a normal healing process. Then, after the gum healed, he prepared the tooth for installing a crown. Then there was a fitting of the crown. Everything was done competently, with the necessary stages such as healing between procedures, no rush or fuss. I sincerely recommend Boris. ❤️

text.text: Radila sam proteze kod doktorke Zorice, a sve ostale popravke i procese kod doktora Borisa, nemam riječi da objasnim koliko su oboje profesionalni, perfekcionisti i ljubazni! Ja imam jako veliki strah od zubara, samim tim odlazak u ordinaciju mi inače predstavlja veliki stres i neugodu, i zato naglašavam da su mi oni pomogli da predjem preko toga!

text.text: American here working in Podgorica Montenegro. Had a crown pop off and into the sink-the sink in the hotel is now the owner of my crown. Looked for a dentist that could speak-understand English and found Dr Raznatovic. Awesome dentist. Even understood my Tex-lish. Did prep work for a new crown no American dentist has done and the placement of the new crown was also done like no American dentist even got close to. He was the 7th dentist to work on this crown. He identified the whole problem with the other crown and got the new one done in 3 days. The other crown had a gap between the edge and gum but Dr Raznatovic made the new one to have the gum come over the bottom edge so no more food/drink under it or floss catching it. Cemented in like none of the other dentists would do. Great and caring dentist and staff.

text.text:
I was on holiday in Virpazar a couple of weeks ago and had to visit an emergency dentist. I was recommended this dentist by the host of the holiday villa we were staying in as they use this dentist themselves. The assured me that the dentist spoke good English and they were correct.

I was quite anxious about using a dentist in another country, but I shouldn't have been. The service was excellent. Initially, she x-rayed the area and then was able to give me an overview of what was causing the pain in the crown area. She made some adjustments on my bite and cleaned between the crowns.

It was an excellent service and I would recommend this dentist especially if you are English speaking.

text.text: There's many things to say about this office. The most important to me was the professionalism shown by all staff and the willingness of the doctors to work harder to heal and save my teeth rather than do the easy thing as they would in other offices. Thank Dr. Nina Djurovic and Dr. Boris Ražnatović!

text.text:
I’m a visitor from Czech republic who came to this dentist emergency. I was in big pain, pleading the doctor to give me the treatment. He refused!!! The nurse was very rude. I had to leave!
I added photos of the place I have been to. It has a sign Dr. Raznatovic on the house and the phone number on the sign matches the phone number on your website.
I sorry for you but you are not only poor merciless and rude people but also you are liars!

ownerResponse.text:
I found out over video survelaince that you were in front of the office at 9:15 and left 9:16 yesterday.
You were not speaking with doctor at all. That was service guy that instaled x-ray aparattus in that moment. He translated what nurse told him to becouse her english is not that good.Maybe you misunderstood that guy was a doctor. There was no doctors in the office at the moment, and you couldnt receive any treatment at that time, just nurse and service guy.You were kindly appointed to closest dental office (20m from us)to receive treatment. You also told them that you were in couple of more offices and they had not time to see you becouse they were already booked.
I just wanted to clear this up becouse  when someone comes with pain we receive patient and deal with his problem.
That is why none of doctors couldnt recall that was talking to you.
Sorry for your troubles
Regards
